test_cases.input_summary: Tracing the legislative history of a data protection law, focusing on how industry lobbying shaped the consent requirements
test_cases.notes: Timeline framework was thorough and well-structured for the lobbying angle. Source documents were correctly identified at each stage. Turning points were genuinely contested moments, not routine steps.

test_cases.input_summary: Tracing the history of a national minimum wage law through multiple revisions over 20 years
test_cases.notes: Excellent handling of a multi-decade legislative history. Comparison framework for successive revisions was clear. Political dynamics section was balanced across party lines.

test_cases.input_summary: Tracing a recently enacted environmental regulation, focusing on whether scientific evidence was accurately reflected in the final rule
test_cases.notes: Good integration of scientific advisory committee records and regulatory impact assessments. The science-to-policy translation angle was well-served. Slightly dense for a journalist working under deadline.
